gazette: Official Gazette dated 03 March 2023 and numbered 32121
title: Special consumption tax base has been changed in the import of passenger cars with electric motors
bodyHtml:
The special consumption tax (SCT) rate for electric cars in Türkiye is determined according to the SCT  basis 

Under the Turkish President’s Decree No. 6885, the SCT basis for determining the SCT rates was increased for passenger cars with an electric motor classified in heading 8703 .

Threshold bases increase as follows; 

- From 700.000 TL to 1.250.000 TL  for  those whose engine power does not exceed 160 kW

- From 750.000 TL to 1.350.000 TL for those whose engine power exceeds 160 kW

The amendment enters into force today.

Click here for the Decision on the Redetermination of the Special Consumption Tax Bases determining the Special Consumption Tax Rates of Certain Goods in the List No. (II) annexed to the Special Consumption Tax Law No. 4760 (Number of Decisions: 6885).
